title: CMs Of MP, C’garh Slam Didi For Protocol Lapses At Prez Event, Say It Disregards Constitution
description: Such type of protocol lapses at the event of the president in West Bengal by the Mamata Banerjee government is ‘highly condemnable’ and added that creating such a situation for the president is not befitting of the position of a chief minister: Madhya Pradesh chief minister Mohan Yadav
